_comment: Used by: npm run github:org:metadata. Requires gh auth with repo scope. Descriptions are plain text (GitHub About).

repos.name: bonding-soup
repos.description: P31 home: C.A.R.S. sim, cognitive passport authoring, alignment, verify tooling. Pairs with p31labs/andromeda for the hub.

repos.name: andromeda
repos.description: P31 Labs monorepo: Cloudflare hub (p31ca), Workers, shared packages. Hub path 04_SOFTWARE/p31ca. Live https://p31ca.org

repos.name: p31ca
repos.description: Technical hub for https://p31ca.org — see README for relation to p31labs/andromeda (04_SOFTWARE/p31ca).

repos.name: phosphorus31.org
repos.description: P31 Labs public programs / org site (parallel track to the technical hub at p31ca.org).

repos.name: node-zero
repos.description: Identity, bond, and vault protocol for P31 assistive technology.

repos.name: love-ledger
repos.description: LOVE — Ledger of Ontological Value and Entropy.

repos.name: game-engine
repos.description: Geodesic building game engine for P31 assistive technology.

repos.name: family-link-os
repos.description: Same truth. Four languages. One mesh.

repos.name: cognitive-prosthetic
repos.description: P31 Cognitive Prosthetic — local-first, autonomous digital centaur for neurodivergent operatives.

repos.name: the-buffer
repos.description: The buffer — cognitive prosthetic for Node Zero (Python).

repos.name: p31ca.org
repos._reason: GitHub archived repo is read-only; set About manually if needed.
repos.description: Archived: legacy site repo. Use https://p31ca.org via p31labs/andromeda (04_SOFTWARE/p31ca) or p31labs/p31ca.

repos.name: phenix-os-quantum
repos.description: Research lineage — quantum sovereign / geometry experiments (Phenix). Current P31 stack: p31ca.org + bonding-soup + andromeda.

repos.name: sovereign-life-os
repos.description: Research lineage — Phenix-Navigator ecosystem shell. Not primary deploy; see p31labs/andromeda and p31ca.org.

repos.name: neuromaker-os
repos.description: Research lineage — Neuromaker / Phenix ecosystem. Active hub: p31ca.org; home: p31labs/bonding-soup.

repos.name: neuromaker-oss
repos.description: Research lineage — Neuromaker OSS track. For current stack see p31labs/bonding-soup and p31labs/andromeda.

repos.name: cognitive-shield
repos.description: Experimental research — cognitive tooling. Related active work: p31labs/cognitive-prosthetic and p31labs/the-buffer.
